name: NetraAI Prior Authorization Agent
description: AI-powered prior authorization automation agent that extracts clinical evidence from diagnostic results and generates complete prior auth packets. Reduces processing time by 80% and handles the $31B annual prior auth burden.

skills.name: Prior Authorization Automation
skills.description: Automates the complete prior authorization workflow by extracting clinical evidence from diagnostic results, matching payer requirements, and generating submission-ready prior auth packets.
examples: Generate prior authorization for diabetic retinopathy screening for patient ID 12345
Create prior auth packet for cataract surgery based on diagnostic results
Extract clinical evidence for anemia treatment authorization
Process prior auth for mental health services with diagnostic support

skills.name: Clinical Evidence Extraction
skills.description: Extracts and structures clinical evidence from diagnostic results, lab reports, and imaging studies to support prior authorization requests.
examples: Extract hemoglobin levels and anemia severity from diagnostic results
Structure diabetic retinopathy findings for insurance submission
Compile mental health assessment scores for treatment authorization

skills.name: Payer Requirements Matching
skills.description: Matches patient clinical data against specific payer requirements and criteria for various medical services and treatments.
examples: Check if patient meets Medicare criteria for diabetic retinopathy screening
Validate insurance requirements for cataract surgery authorization
Match clinical findings to Medicaid prior auth criteria

skills.name: Multi-Diagnostic Coordination
skills.description: Coordinates multiple diagnostic tools (anemia, cataract, DR, mental health, Parkinson's) to build comprehensive clinical pictures for complex prior authorization cases.
examples: Run comprehensive screening workflow for elderly patient
Coordinate multiple diagnostics for complex medical case
Orchestrate screening battery for prior auth evidence

skills.name: FHIR Integration
skills.description: Integrates with FHIR R4 compliant systems to retrieve patient data and store diagnostic results in standardized healthcare formats.
examples: Retrieve patient demographics and medical history from FHIR server
Store diagnostic results as FHIR DiagnosticReport resources
Query patient timeline for prior authorization context
